name: Minecraft Story Mode Lorebook
description:
Contains Information from S1E1 to S2E5

A lorebook that contains information about all settings, items, exclusive mobs, and anything else seen from S1E1 to S2E5. The lorebook has the ability to be cloned and used now that’s it’s released and finished.

If I’m missing something from the games, list them in the comments and I will see if I can add them. I will not do any human characters since I decided to scrap that part.
creator: RogueTemplar
